query:
INSERT INTO notifications (type, title, message, relatedLeadId, relatedLeadName, isRead, createdAt) VALUES
('new_lead', 'New Hot Lead: Sam Altman', 'Sam Altman (OpenAI) scored 95 — pricing page visited 8 times, demo requested', 1, 'Sam Altman', 0, '2026-03-01 14:00:00'),
('score_change', 'Score Increased: Michael Truell', 'Michael Truell (Cursor) score jumped from 78 to 92 after booking enterprise demo', 3, 'Michael Truell', 0, '2026-03-02 09:00:00'),
('pipeline_move', 'Pipeline: Arvind Jain moved to Proposal', 'Arvind Jain (Glean) advanced to Proposal stage — demo scheduled with VP Engineering', 8, 'Arvind Jain', 0, '2026-03-03 10:00:00'),
('outreach_reply', 'Reply: Michael Truell responded', 'Michael Truell (Cursor) replied to your outreach email about developer tools integration', 3, 'Michael Truell', 1, '2026-03-01 16:00:00'),
('outreach_reply', 'Reply: Arvind Jain responded', 'Arvind Jain (Glean) replied to partnership proposal — interested in deeper integration', 8, 'Arvind Jain', 1, '2026-02-28 09:00:00'),
('outreach_reply', 'Reply: Alina Vandenberghe responded', 'Alina Vandenberghe (Chili Piper) replied about scheduling + lead scoring synergy partnership', 20, 'Alina Vandenberghe', 0, '2026-03-01 10:00:00'),
('new_lead', 'New Lead: David Chevalier', 'David Chevalier (Surfe) entered pipeline — visited pricing 5 times in 3 days', 15, 'David Chevalier', 1, '2026-02-27 10:00:00'),
('score_change', 'Score Alert: Ali Ghodsi', 'Ali Ghodsi (Databricks) score increased to 85 after attending webinar + pricing visits', 5, 'Ali Ghodsi', 1, '2026-02-26 09:00:00'),
('new_subscriber', 'New Subscriber: Priya Sharma', 'Priya Sharma (aiventures.com) subscribed via email channel — lead score 95', NULL, NULL, 1, '2026-01-18 10:00:00'),
('new_subscriber', 'New Subscriber: Alex Turner', 'Alex Turner (productled.io) subscribed via social channel — lead score 90', NULL, NULL, 0, '2026-02-04 11:30:00'),
('pipeline_move', 'Pipeline: Alina Vandenberghe moved to Proposal', 'Alina Vandenberghe (Chili Piper) advanced to Proposal — executive demo booked with CTO', 20, 'Alina Vandenberghe', 0, '2026-03-01 15:00:00'),
('outreach_open', 'Email Opened: Sam Altman', 'Sam Altman (OpenAI) opened your partnership opportunity email', 1, 'Sam Altman', 1, '2026-02-28 14:30:00');
